title: upsert_chat_contact bumps ChatContact state_seq on every call even for existing contacts
description: store::upsert_chat_contact uses INSERT OR IGNORE with ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET last_seen_at, then unconditionally calls bump_state_seq("ChatContact"). When the contact already exists, rows_affected=1 but the update is a no-op in terms of contact data. This causes spurious state token bumps on every user_joined event for a returning user, triggering unnecessary JMAP client cache invalidations. Same pattern as nie-kef6.24/.25/.47/.64.
